name: Tomato and Basil Pesto
recipeInstructions:
1. Core the tomatoes and cut them in half.
2. Grill over very hot coals for only a few minutes to develop color and flavor. If you don't have access to hot coals, use the oven broiler instead. Remove from the grill and set aside to cool.
3. Place basil leaves, parsley, and minced garlic in a food processor.
4. Process until smooth.
5. Add tomato, vinegar, and lemon juice, then process again.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste (leaving out the salt and using more black pepper if desired).
